query:
-- Check freshness distribution of stale projects
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN COALESCE(sourceLastSeenAt, lastActivityAt, createdAt) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 180 DAY) THEN '180+ days'
    WHEN COALESCE(sourceLastSeenAt, lastActivityAt, createdAt) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN '90-180 days'
    WHEN COALESCE(sourceLastSeenAt, lastActivityAt, createdAt) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) THEN '60-90 days'
    WHEN COALESCE(sourceLastSeenAt, lastActivityAt, createdAt) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN '30-60 days'
    ELSE 'within 30 days'
  END as freshness_bucket,
  lifecycleStatus,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM projects
WHERE lifecycleStatus IN ('active', 'stale') AND suppressed = 0
GROUP BY freshness_bucket, lifecycleStatus
ORDER BY freshness_bucket;

-- Check what sourceLastSeenAt looks like for stale projects
SELECT MIN(sourceLastSeenAt) as oldest_seen, MAX(sourceLastSeenAt) as newest_seen,
  MIN(lastActivityAt) as oldest_activity, MAX(lastActivityAt) as newest_activity,
  MIN(createdAt) as oldest_created, MAX(createdAt) as newest_created
FROM projects
WHERE lifecycleStatus = 'stale' AND suppressed = 0;
